backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the QRIS payment image in OrderForm.tsx with a new asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file describing their purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes using the OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Dim Sum Food Orders Landing Page' that mounts the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages order state and renders Hero, Menu, OrderForm, and Footer sections with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying SUMOJI branding, DKI Jakarta address, a WhatsApp link, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dim sum background image, SUMOJI branding, tagline, and an 'Order Now' button that scrolls to the menu.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering three dim sum items (Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, Party Pack 50pcs) with ingredient checkboxes, quantity controls, and add-to-order functionality.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component displaying a cart summary, contact input fields, a QRIS payment image, payment confirmation, and order submission with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no implementation, noting that all order data is stored locally in the browser.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file configuring Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm cream and red/gold theme with dark mode support.
frontend/src/lib/formatCurrency.ts: Exports a utility function that formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah currency string (e.g., 'Rp. 17.500,-').
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and feature history, recording that the current task is replacing the QRIS payment image in OrderForm.tsx with a newly uploaded image saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png.
